texto: An idle mind was a recipe for disaster. Bathsheba wasn’t just teetering on the edge
autor: I knew she was going to be diving right into a pool of tragedy.
explicacao: Citação de I knew she was going to be diving right into a pool of tragedy. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “An idle mind was a recipe for disaster. Bathsheba wasn’t just teetering on the edge” articula reflexao, anna-aquino, recipe em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
